Container.Name: OmniHub
Container.Overview: OmniHub is a unified dashboard for self-hosted media server services (Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Readarr, Bazarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, qBittorrent, Transmission, Deluge, SABnzbd, NZBGet, Tautulli, and Unraid). Pure frontend PWA — no backend, no database, no proxying. Your browser talks directly to your services.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the OmniHub web interface.
